sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n74031" key="o)neirodo/ths" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ὀνειρο-δότης</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ου</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, <sense id="n74031.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">giver of dreams,</tr_> Perdrizet-Lefèbvre <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">Les graffites grecs du Memnonion d' Abydos</tr_> No.<bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">493</biblScope> </bibl> :—fem. <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ὀνειρο-δότειρα</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, cj. for <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ὀνειρο-δότιον</orth> in Poet. <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">de herb.</tr_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">42</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
